name: Tamale Casserole
recipeIngredient: 7 1/2 ounces black olives, drained, can pitted
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix cornmeal, milk and egg in a 2 1/2-quart casserole.
2. Brown meat in a skillet, stirring to keep crumbly.
3. Add chili-seasoning mix, salt, tomatoes, corn and olives and mix well.
4. Stir the mixture into the cornmeal mixture.
5. Bake at 350 degrees F for 1 hour and 15 minutes.
6. Sprinkle cheese over top and bake until cheese melts, about 5 more minutes.
